creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
The build have been added in this morning.

CURRENT after r286392 should have the INDEX-11 configuration, I found a problem with portsnap builder caused by the saved world tarball, and that have been updated to a newer FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p17 based image with full headers and verified that INDEX-11 is generating expected results and believe that I have resolved all known problems.

INDEX-8 build have been ceased.
